description: Drag to scroll - just like on a touch device!

manifest.author: Constantine Sazonov
manifest.description: Drag to scroll - just like on a touch device.

name: Drag To Scroll

releases.author: constsz
releases.description:
### This release addresses feedback from the plugin review.

**Fixes**:
- Removed unnecessary `console.log` statements.
- Updated UI text to use sentence case as requested.

Thank you to @Zachatoo for the review!
releases.name: obsidian-drag-to-scroll@1.0.2

releases.author: constsz
releases.description:
This is a maintenance release to address feedback from the Obsidian plugin review team.

- **Fix:** Replaced direct JavaScript styling (`style.cursor`) with a CSS class (`is-dragging-to-scroll`) for better theme compatibility.
- **New:** Added a `styles.css` file to house the new css class used by the plugin.
releases.name: obsidian-drag-to-scroll@1.0.1

releases.author: constsz
releases.description:
Plugin for Obsidian that adds drag to scroll functionality. Hold mouse button and drag - now you can scroll like on touch device!

Works in both Edit and Reading modes. Inspired by PDF viewers and similar browser extensions.

Only for Desktop (on mobile this is a basic functionality).
releases.name: obsidian-drag-to-scroll@1.0.0
